agentConfigs.name: Pre-Call Research Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Generates company research, value hypotheses, and discovery questions for pre-call briefings

agentConfigs.name: Briefing Compiler Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Compiles research findings into structured pre-call briefing documents

agentConfigs.name: Slide Selection Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Selects optimal slides from the library based on deal context and deck structure

agentConfigs.name: Content Assembly Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Assembles selected slides into cohesive deck narratives with transitions

agentConfigs.name: Compliance Review Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Reviews generated decks for brand compliance, data accuracy, and legal requirements

agentConfigs.name: Deal Chat Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Provides conversational AI assistance for deal-related questions and analysis

agentConfigs.name: Structure Inference Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Analyzes templates to infer optimal deck section structures per touch type

agentConfigs.name: Slide Classification Agent
agentConfigs.responsibility: Classifies slides by industry, persona, funnel stage, and content type during ingestion
